2025-07-03.title: Reporting System Needs Serious Improvement for User Safety
2025-07-03.text:
Good app overall, but the reporting system needs serious improvement to better protect users and respond faster to harmful behavior.

Yesterday, I had an uncomfortable experience with a stranger who pressured me for personal info, asked for my phone number, pushed me to call, and suddenly asked me out despite not knowing me.
